meta.title: ai-mods — Solutions that work in the real world
meta.description: AI Solutions · Change & Enablement · UX Concepts · Automation.
hero.headline: Solutions that work in the real world.
hero.tagline: AI Solutions · Change & Enablement · UX Concepts · Automation
hero.intro: I spot where work gets stuck, which tool fits and where AI adds value or is just theater. From that I build helpful everyday tools, AI skills or agent frameworks that solve real pain points. With change management built on tangible solutions, I get the people on board who work with them every day. Behind ai-mods: Chris, Würzburg.
skills.heading: Not a classic developer.
skills.intro: My roots lie in the processes I can improve today: tech, marketing, communications, support and operations. With initiative and AI tools, I have developed a valuable skill on top. I can build solutions in a way that people understand and enjoy using. Whether change lands well is just a matter of noticeable improvement and a good story.
services.kicker: // services — what I can build for you
about.heading: Behind ai-mods is Chris.
about.subheading: Cross-expertise from 20+ years on the job.
about.p1: My journey runs from tech and GIS through marketing & communications to service and operational team leadership with 16 people. The curious nerd who teaches himself things has always been on board. And when it matters, I can do suit and tie, too. Today I combine all of that with AI. As a strategist, toolmaker and enabler with a can-do mentality.
about.credential2: Certified Specialist for Marketing & Corporate Communications (IHK)
contact.heading: Let's improve something.
contact.text: Does your team or company need someone exactly like me?
totop.label: Scroll to top
